# Alatar ◆

> [!info] 💧 Hero · Threat: **12** · Spirit
> **WP** 3  ·  **ATK** 3  ·  **DEF** 1  ·  **HP** 4

*Istari. Easterling.*

---

While you control exactly 2 heroes, Alatar gains a (Tactics) icon and: “**Response**: At the end of setup, search your collection for a copy of Blue Staff and attach it to Alatar.”
**Action**: Exhaust an **_Istari_** hero to place 2 progress on a player side quest (bypassing any active location). (Limit twice per round.)

**Pack:** [[ALeP - Strange News in Bree]] #1
